description_long: This object is a cylindrical cup with a wide, octagonal rim and a slightly tapered body, resembling the form of a camera lens. The exterior is predominantly matte black with ribbed grip sections and features several detailed markings, including white and red text bands, numeric indicators, and a switch labeled 'AF/MF.' The cup has a distinctive red ring near the top, a hallmark of Canon's L-series camera lenses, and the words 'ULTRASONIC' and '16-35mm' are visible on the side. The surface is mostly smooth with some textured grip areas, and the interior appears hollow and deep, suitable for holding liquids. There are no visible handles or lids, and the branding and technical markings give it a realistic, high-fidelity appearance. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with a focus on functional aesthetics.
description: A matte black, cylindrical cup styled to resemble a Canon camera lens, featuring ribbed grips, red and white text, and detailed technical markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide octagonal rim, Canon branding, and detailed lens markings with a visible AF/MF switch.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the 'ULTRASONIC' text in orange, the 16-35mm marking, and the ribbed grip sections.
description_view_2: Rear side view displays the plain black ribbed surface with partial 'ULTRASONIC' text, minimal markings.
description_view_3: Back view shows the mostly unmarked black surface with a red ring and partial Canon branding.
